page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this instance allocates one thread per physical core across 32 physical cores. The system operates on the KVM hypervisor and features a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density make it a specialized resource for memory-bound workloads, avoiding the overhead of multi-threading while offering predictable compute performance.

The ecs.r9ae.8xlarge is designed for memory-intensive applications that require dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading. Suitable workloads include medium-sized in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:8 resource ratio. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor operating at 2.25 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, the instance allocates one thread per physical core across 32 physical cores under the KVM hypervisor. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance without hyperthreading overhead. This configuration is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive applications that demand stable, dedicated compute resources. It is highly suited for workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale data processing.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance featuring a high memory-to-CPU ratio for demanding in-memory databases and data processing workloads.

256 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB of memory per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer
No local storage included, requiring network-attached block storage
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching layers, and data processing
